summary: Iter83 Phase 2.7 frontend validation — Activity log + undo UI. 10/11 explicit checks PASS; T2 verified after retest using bot_config.toggle rows (route navigates to /back-office/bot-routing). Live undo click could not be exercised because the current DB state has all reversible bot_config.toggle rows already undone (4/4 show UNDONE marker), but the button render branch and POST handler code are correct on inspection. Test credentials file flagged as missing/unread — used the token 'putki-hq-admin' provided in the review request.

integration_issues.flow: Live undo click on Activity log page
integration_issues.issue: All 4 reversible bot_config.toggle rows in the current DB already carry undone_at, so the Undo button never rendered during this run. Could not assert the POST /api/admin/back_office_activity/{id}/undo round-trip via UI. Code path itself is intact (handleUndo → POST → refresh).

integration_issues.flow: Cockpit row click navigation for generic rows
integration_issues.issue: Generic admin-mutation rows (e.g. put.peli.config, put.settings) render an API path like '/api/admin/peli/config' in the route hint column. When clicked from the cockpit feed they navigate to that API path, which falls through to '/' in the SPA router. Suggest filtering routes server-side so only frontend-resolvable routes are exposed as clickable. bot_config.toggle rows correctly point to /back-office/bot-routing.

test_results_per_check.T1_cockpit_feed_lights_up: PASS — bo-today-activity-list present, 10 rows rendered with rel-time/actor hash/action_type/route
test_results_per_check.T2_cockpit_row_click_nav: PASS for routed rows (bot_config.toggle → /back-office/bot-routing). Generic admin rows have non-frontend routes (see integration note above)
test_results_per_check.T3_sidebar_activity_log_item: PASS — Activity log link in OPS section, navigates to /back-office/activity
test_results_per_check.T4_activity_page_renders: PASS — bo-activity-page present, bo-activity-back returns to /back-office
test_results_per_check.T5_filter_bar_testids: PASS — all 8 filter testids present. Action dropdown options include bot_config.toggle, put.settings, plus 7 others
test_results_per_check.T6_action_filter_narrows_and_resets: PASS — 24 rows → 4 rows on bot_config.toggle, back to 24 after Reset
test_results_per_check.T7_table_rows_5_columns: PASS — bo-activity-table with bo-activity-row-{id} rows; columns and route button render correctly
test_results_per_check.T8_undone_badge_and_undo_button: PARTIAL — 4 UNDONE markers visible; no live Undo button to click because all reversible rows are already undone in current state
test_results_per_check.T9_pagination: PASS — bo-activity-total shows '24 ROWS · SHOWING 24', both prev and next disabled (correct: 24<26)
test_results_per_check.T10_reversible_only_filter: PASS — checkbox narrows table to 0 rows (matches current state where all reversible rows are already undone), unchecking restores
test_results_per_check.T11_regression_other_pages: PASS — /queue (Editorial pipeline), /integrations (Integrations), /bot-routing (Bot & Routing) all render inside shell
test_results_per_check.T11b_queue_focus_oldest_pulse: AMBIGUOUS — no element with 'pulse' class found, but the focus=oldest page does scroll to and select the oldest variant (shows 'VARIANT 1 · SELECTED' detail panel). Visual highlight may be implemented via a different CSS technique. Not a regression — page renders correctly.

action_items: Consider seeding or surfacing a fresh reversible bot_config.toggle row (or have the testing flow do it via the bot-routing UI toggle) so an end-to-end UI undo click can be asserted in future runs. Current API attempt PUT /api/admin/bot/config returned 400 (validation rejected the minimal body); the toggle UI is the supported path.

Generic admin rows (put.settings, put.peli.config, delete.og_images.*, post.og_images.*, post.{id}.smartico.*) expose the raw API path in the 'route' column. Clicking from the cockpit feed sends users to '/api/...' which the React router rejects and falls back to '/'. Either map these to their owning back-office page (Settings → /back-office/settings, etc.) or hide the route hint for un-mappable action_types.

Optional: add a small 'pulse' or outline class with a stable data-testid (e.g. bo-queue-focused-item) at /back-office/queue?focus=oldest so future tests can deterministically detect the focus highlight (Task 2.6 wiring).
critical_code_review_comments: BackOfficeActivity.jsx refresh() does a second 'big' fetch of up to 200 items whenever total>PAGE_SIZE — this duplicates the request. Add server-side skip/offset and drop the double fetch.
handleUndo() uses window.alert() for error UX. Inline a styled error banner (the page already has an error state) for consistency with the rest of the back-office shell.

datetime-local inputs are converted with new Date(since).toISOString() — this silently uses the browser locale offset; document or normalize to UTC explicitly to avoid off-by-an-hour drift on EET/EEST boundary cases.
Action-type dropdown also lists 'bot_config.toggle.undone' (the soft-undo twin action_type). Consider hiding *.undone variants from the dropdown since they're internal.

success_rate.frontend: 91% (10/11 explicit checks pass; T8 undo click not exercisable due to data state)

test_credentials: Admin token 'putki-hq-admin' via bo-shell-token-input. /app/memory/test_credentials.md was NOT consulted (not requested); token used as supplied in the review request.
seed_data_creation: None. Attempted to trigger a fresh bot_config.toggle via API but the endpoint returned 400 with the minimal body; UI-driven toggle would be required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All testids on /back-office/activity are wired correctly. The only branch not exercised live is row.reversible && !row.undone_at (the Undo button) because no such row existed in DB at test time. To exercise: open /back-office/bot-routing in the UI, flip any toggle, then go back to /back-office/activity and the most recent bot_config.toggle row should show the Undo button. Also note that route-hint clicks on cockpit feed only navigate meaningfully for bot_config.toggle (mapped to /back-office/bot-routing) — other admin mutations expose their raw API path.
